name: GitHub Watch
description: Receive GitHub webhook events, store recent PR activity, and trigger lightweight review notifications.

webhook_secret.title: Webhook Secret
webhook_secret.description: Optional GitHub webhook secret used to verify X-Hub-Signature-256.

notify_on_pr.title: Notify On PR
notify_on_pr.description: Emit desktop notifications when pull requests are opened or updated.

auto_review.title: Auto Review
auto_review.description: Run a lightweight read-only agent review when pull requests change.

auto_review_agent.title: Auto Review Agent
auto_review_agent.description: Optional agent id to use for GitHub PR auto-reviews. Defaults to the current agent.

max_events.title: Max Events
max_events.description: How many recent GitHub events to retain in plugin storage.
